steps.name: s_cp_11 regression test (RED)
steps.description: Write acceptance test s_cp_11_stop_while_streaming_closes_stream_with_stopped_result in crates/overdrive-control-plane/tests/acceptance/streaming_submit.rs. The test submits a job on the NDJSON streaming lane, emits a Running transition to keep the stream open, then emits a Terminated transition with reason Stopped { by: Reconciler }. It asserts the stream closes via a converged_stopped line within 5 seconds — not via the 60s cap timer — and that no converged_failed/timeout line appears. This test must be RED before step 01-02 lands.
criteria: Stream stays open after LifecycleEvent { to: Running } is emitted
Stream closes within 5 seconds after LifecycleEvent { to: Terminated, reason: Stopped { by: Reconciler } } is emitted
The final NDJSON line has kind == "converged_stopped"
No line with kind == "converged_failed" appears in the stream
No line with terminal_reason.kind == "timeout" appears in the stream

steps.name: Add ConvergedStopped and handle Terminated in check_terminal + lagged_recover (GREEN)
steps.description: Make s_cp_11 pass. (1) Add ConvergedStopped { alloc_id: Option<String>, by: StoppedBy } as a new top-level variant to SubmitEvent in api.rs alongside ConvergedRunning and ConvergedFailed; wire serde tag to "converged_stopped"; register it in the OpenAPI components block. (2) In streaming.rs check_terminal add an arm for AllocStateWire::Terminated that returns Some(SubmitEvent::ConvergedStopped { ... }) carrying the alloc_id and the StoppedBy extracted from the event reason (defaulting to StoppedBy::Reconciler). (3) In streaming.rs lagged_recover add an arm for AllocState::Terminated that returns Some(SubmitEvent::ConvergedStopped { ... }). (4) Update the streaming.rs module docstring to list ConvergedStopped as the third terminal condition alongside ConvergedRunning and ConvergedFailed.
criteria: SubmitEvent gains a ConvergedStopped variant with fields alloc_id: Option<String> and by: StoppedBy; it serialises as kind == "converged_stopped"
check_terminal returns Some(ConvergedStopped) when event.to == AllocStateWire::Terminated
lagged_recover returns Some(ConvergedStopped) when the latest obs row state == AllocState::Terminated
s_cp_11 passes: stream closes with converged_stopped within 5s of the Terminated broadcast event
s_cp_01, s_cp_03, s_cp_06, s_cp_07, s_lt_01 continue to pass without modification
streaming.rs module docstring lists ConvergedStopped as a third terminal condition
